name: project_review
description: Delegate a project review to an external agent session, then digest findings for the user

path.description: Project working directory (must be under agents.allowed_dirs). Optional; omit for a prompt-only planning pass.

focus.description: Optional review focus (e.g. security, tests, UX)

steps.description: Spawn external agent to review project at {path} (focus: {focus})

args.title: Project review
args.prompt: You are doing a focused project review for a supervisor (not implementing changes). Working directory: {path}. Focus: {focus}. Produce: (1) executive summary, (2) strengths, (3) risks / bugs / debt, (4) recommended next steps ordered by leverage, (5) anything that needs human decision. Stay concise; prefer bullets.

steps.description: Pull session status / last output after the review session finishes

Digest the external project review for the human supervisor. If the agent session failed to spawn (empty cwd, path not allowed, or no session service), say so clearly and instead: (a) ask for an allowed path if {path} was missing/refused, (b) give a short review plan they can run once a session is available. If results exist, structure: executive summary, top risks, recommended next actions, open questions. Do not invent file-level findings. Offer to remember decisions or schedule follow-ups.
